title: Stichorkis bracteata
taxonomy: Stichorkis bracteata is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Stichorkis is a relatively small group of orchids, and Stichorkis bracteata is one of its many species. The plant's classification places it within the subtribe Coelogyneinae, which is a subunit of the tribe Coelogyneae. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchids.
